criteria.reason: Current `src/App.tsx` renders the sidebar header from `activeProject?.name` with a neutral fallback and no longer shows the old stacked Projects/Workspace/runtime labels.
Current `src/App.tsx` uses a compact `new-project-button` that opens a dialog, and `createProject` still submits through `window.bigIDE.projects.create`; the fresh Playwright run passed this flow.

Current `src/App.tsx` moves session creation into each project item via `new-session-button`, targets the selected project id, and the fresh Playwright run passed session creation plus Start/Stop lifecycle actions.

Current `server/web-backend.js` and `electron/main.js` initialize persisted state with `projects: []`, and `src/App.tsx` no longer seeds a default project in UI state; this was verified by code inspection rather than resetting persisted local state during verification.
Current `src/App.tsx` uses neutral `Workspace ready` copy, and a fresh repository search found `Web runtime ready` only in task artifacts, not in production UI/runtime sources.

Current `src/App.tsx` removes the old padded `main > section` wrapper and uses a single workspace shell with a horizontal rail container; the separator cleanup is supported by code inspection and the fresh build/e2e run produced no regressions.

Current `src/App.tsx` places compact badges beneath the session title and renders smaller Start/Stop controls while preserving the same actions; the fresh Playwright run passed lifecycle interactions.
Current `src/App.tsx` replaces the old panel strip with `[+ New Panel]` and a modal chooser, and a fresh search found no old panel-toggle markers in production source.
Current `src/App.tsx` stores panel instances as per-session arrays and renders per-panel close buttons; the fresh Playwright run confirmed closing/reopening Agent and opening duplicate Files panels.

Current `src/App.tsx` keeps the rail `flex-nowrap` with `overflow-x-auto`, marks each panel wrapper `draggable`, and reorders panels through `moveSessionPanel`; reorder behavior was verified by code inspection, while horizontal scrolling was also covered by the fresh Playwright run.
Current `src/App.tsx` binds each editor panel to a single `panel.filePath` with no editor tab strip, and the fresh Playwright run asserted `editor-tabs` are absent.
Current `openFile` logic in `src/App.tsx` focuses an already-open editor for the same file and only appends a new editor panel for a different file; the fresh Playwright run passed this behavior.

Current `src/components/file-tree.tsx` defaults directories to collapsed and toggles expansion explicitly, and the fresh Playwright run confirmed nested files stay hidden until their directories are opened.

commands_run: rg -n "Web runtime ready" src server electron e2e .agent/tasks/refactor
